reviews.review_description: Voxels are the only way to write a proper love letter to the original Duck Hunt. I hope you keep up with the updates you promised as the core game loop is good. I call it a sprint because game is short at current development. The shotgun feels good, and the flick to finish the reload is great. I would however, like a larger interaction box for grabbing the shells. Can we get some voxel Moose, or Elk and more guns. I think a boss battle would be great against a bear or a mountain lion or even a badger after 5 rounds of the loop ending with the fish. Just to keep things fresh and the players on their toes. I just want more of this nostalgia goodness.
